items.body: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

## рџЋЇ Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This bot-filed issue requests documentation updates to `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-provisioning/docs/design.md` to reflect two behavioral changes introduced in PR #58482: reachability-based model/enum filtering via `CollectReachableTypes()` in `ProvisioningOutputLibrary`, and shared resource model handling logic in `ProvisioningTypeFactory.CreateModelCore`.

<details>
<summary>рџ“‹ Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-provisioning` (Provisioning generator)
**Affected API:** `ProvisioningOutputLibrary.CollectReachableTypes()`, `ProvisioningTypeFactory.CreateModelCore`
**Scenarios:**
- Update `design.md` В§ 6 "Output Library" to replace the now-inaccurate statement about post-processor pruning with a description of the reachability walk
- Add a "Shared Resource Models" subsection to `design.md` В§ 5 "TypeFactory & Type Resolution" documenting canonical provider selection logic

**Root ask:** Keep the internal design document accurate following the behavioral changes in PR #58482.
</details>

<details>
<summary>рџ”Ћ Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This is a documentation-only task вЂ” no runtime bug is present. The changes are straightforward Markdown edits to an internal design document.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review PR #58482 (commit b524f0a13a0572efbb7ae548f2bce5b86bc61713) to confirm the behavioral changes match the described intent
2. Edit `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-provisioning/docs/design.md` per the Implementation Guide in the issue body
3. Verify Markdown renders correctly (headings, fenced blocks, list formatting intact)
</details>

<details>
<summary>рџЏ·пёЏ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Provisioning` вЂ” the issue is explicitly about the Provisioning generator (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-provisioning/`), which generates `Azure.Provisioning.*` libraries
- **Service:** `CodeGen` вЂ” code generation issues in `/eng/packages/` are labeled "CodeGen" (color #e99695); the issue title "[Provisioning Generator]" and service directory confirm this
- **Confidence:** High вЂ” matches the pattern of several quality reference issues (#57921, #57489, #57488, #57387, #57205) all labeled `Provisioning` + `CodeGen`
</details>

<details>
<summary>рџ‘Ґ Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %CodeGen` (line 1198) вЂ” the issue has the "CodeGen" service label; this entry requires only "CodeGen" and matches
- **AzureSdkOwners:** `@JoshLove-msft`
- **ServiceOwners:** none listed
- **Routing action:** Assigned `@JoshLove-msft`; no "needs-team-attention" (issue is bot-filed, not customer-reported)
